PlaceTempStockpileStep1.title: Stockpile
PlaceTempStockpileStep1.description:
Let's get the crew working!
A [color=KHAKI]Temporary Stockpile[/color] placed outside of your ship will allow your crew to store materials to work with.

Begin by clicking the highlighted [color=PURPLE]Zones[/color] button.

PlaceTempStockpileStep2.description:
Place a [color=KHAKI]Temporary Stockpile[/color] by first selecting the [color=PURPLE]Temporary Stockpile[/color] button.

Next, [color=LIGHT_GREEN]click and drag[/color] on any empty space outside, to the left or right of your ship using the {select}. [color=LIGHT_GREEN]Letting go of the button[/color] will place the [color=KHAKI]Temporary Stockpile[/color].

Ensure your [color=KHAKI]Temporary Stockpile[/color] covers at least 20 cells.

PlaceTempStockpileStep3.description:
Use {action} whilst not over a menu, or {ui_cancel}, to exit from placing a [color=KHAKI]Temporary Stockpile[/color].
This also works on most menus and designations/placements.

PlaceTempStockpileStep4.description:
Eventually you will need to build a [color=KHAKI]Stockpile[/color] inside of your ship, as once you leave this sector, all items in a [color=KHAKI]Temporary Stockpile[/color] will be left behind.

You can also limit what items can be stored in a [color=KHAKI]Stockpile[/color] by forbidding them within the selected stockpiles menu.

You can now unpause the game by either pressing the [color=PURPLE]play[/color] button in the top right or pressing {speed_paused}. Your crew will then move the resources from inside your ship and into the new [color=KHAKI]Stockpile[/color].
